title: Access Control Policy and Procedures
description: Develop
nist_mapping: and disseminate access control policy and procedures.

title: Account Management
description: Manage information system accounts including identifying account types.

title: Access Enforcement
description: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information.

description: Enforce approved authorizations for controlling the flow of information.

title: Least Privilege
description: Employ the principle of least privilege.

title: Unsuccessful Logon Attempts
description: Enforce a limit of consecutive invalid logon attempts.

description: Prevent further access via session lock after inactivity.

title: Remote Access
description: Establish and document usage restrictions for remote access.

title: Publicly Accessible Content
description: Designate individuals authorized to post publicly accessible content.

description: Develop and maintain a security awareness training program.

title: Security Awareness Training
description: Provide security awareness training to all users.

title: Role-Based Security Training
description: Provide role-based security training to privileged users.

title: Audit and Accountability Policy
description: Develop and maintain audit and accountability policy.

description: Identify events that require auditing.

title: Content of Audit Records
description: Ensure audit records contain required information fields.

title: Audit Record Review Analysis and Reporting
description: Review and analyze audit records for inappropriate activity.

title: Time Stamps
description: Use internal system clocks to generate time stamps.

title: Protection of Audit Information
description: Protect audit information from unauthorized access/modification.

title: Audit Record Retention
description: Retain audit records for 3 years.

title: Audit Record Generation
description: Generate audit records for auditable events.

description: Develop and maintain security assessment and authorization policy.

title: Control Assessments

title: Authorization

title: Continuous Monitoring

title: Baseline Configuration

title: Configuration Settings

title: Least Functionality

title: System Component Inventory
description: Develop and document an inventory of system components.

title: Contingency Planning Policy
description: Develop and maintain contingency planning policy.

title: System Backup

title: Identification and Authentication (Non-Org Users)
description: Uniquely identify and authenticate non-organizational users.

title: Incident Response Policy

title: Incident Handling

title: Planning Policy
